evals.prompt: Create activation tests for tri-client-skill-port. Include near misses where official-ai-devdocs or agent-install-sync should win instead.
evals.expected_output: Generates trigger-evals.json with realistic should-trigger and should-not-trigger prompts, competing skill notes, and routing expectations.

evals.prompt: This skill overtriggers whenever I mention docs. Build eval prompts that prove the description needs a tighter boundary.
evals.expected_output: Creates negative cases around adjacent docs tasks and recommends description changes that reduce overtriggering.

evals.prompt: I renamed a skill and now I don't know if agents will still auto-load it. Make a trigger test set before I publish.
evals.expected_output: Creates a realistic activation suite for the renamed skill and calls out frontmatter fields to inspect.
